title: dryopteris woodsiisora var. tenuissima
intro: Dryopteris woodsiisora var. tenuissima is a variety of the eastern wood fern, a plant species native to the eastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the fronds of the plant can be made into teas or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
